name: Conversational Intake
author: Mac
description: Cinematic conversational intake flow — welcome entrance, brand snapshot with shopper persona report cards, focus area picker, Shopify connect, live AI Agent chat preview, channel + helpdesk migration steps, and a sidebar Go-live checklist that ticks off in real time. Self-contained, no API keys required.

name: Intake — AI Agent Trial
author: Mac
description: Streamlined intake variant scoped to AI Agent trial users — landing page → tone-of-voice voice card → 9-skill setup with Edit/Preview right panels (UrbanStems Chat 2.0 widget preloaded per skill) → 2-channel selection (Email + Chat) → cinematic closing scoped to the content area. Reuses the existing intake prototype's component patterns. Self-contained, no API keys required.
